result.summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for buson.com.br; the site appears to be a consumer bus-ticket marketplace plus a business software offering, but no public API, GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI documentation was discoverable.
result.description: Buson is a Brazilian platform for buying intercity bus tickets online and also offers Buson Suíte, a cloud platform for bus operators and agencies to manage sales and related operations. Its public website focuses on consumer booking and sales-product marketing.
